Header.Name: DataEnvelope_v2.0
Header.Description: Profile for Data Envelopes Editor version2

ComponentSpec.Component:
<Element name="institute"
Level 1: Data Envelope Metadata Basic Information on Data-Envelope. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Envelope-Metadata
Title Follow the format: Dataset Name Version-X Data-Envelope Version-Y. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Title
1.1 Version See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Version Version Number See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Version-Number
1.1.1 Dates See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Dates Creation Date From See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Creation-Date-From
Creation Date To See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Creation-Date-To
Publication Date See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Publication-Date
1.2 Author Data Envelope Provide information on the author of the data-envelope. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Author-Data-Envelope Person Name Provide their full name. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Person-Name
Orcid Id See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Orcid-Id
Email See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Email
1.3 Comments See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comments Comment Please use this space to provide any feedback on this section and to share any other insights or information you think would be useful for this level. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comment
Level 2: Dataset Metadata See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Dataset-Metadata Title See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Title
Description Provide a free text account of the dataset or resource (limit 200 words). Include information about the content and topic of the data, sources and motivations for dataset creation. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description
2.1 Genre See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Genre Controlled Term Choose one or more of the following genres that apply to the dataset/resources: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Controlled-Term /proxy/skosmos/sd/ineo-informationtypes
2.1.1 Other Term See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other-Term Term Specify the particular genre of the dataset if not included in the dropdown list above. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term
Term Uri See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term-Uri
2.2 Topic See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Topic Controlled Term Choose one or more of the following topics (from NWO research list) that apply to the dataset/resource: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Controlled-Term /proxy/skosmos/sd/nwo-researchfields
2.2.1 Other Term See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other-Term Term Specify topic(s) of the dataset if not included in the dropdown list above. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term
Term Uri See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term-Uri
2.3 Dates See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Dates Date From See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Date-From
Date To See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Date-To
Date Published Provide the dataset publication date. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Date-Published
2.4 Temporal Coverage See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Temporal-Coverage
2.4.1 Coverage Period See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Coverage-Period Date Start Provide start year of temporal scope of the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Date-Start
Date End Provide end date of temporal scope of the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Date-End
Date Range Unstructured In case temporal scope cannot be captured in a range, add relevant years. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Date-Range-Unstructured
2.4.2 Comments See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comments Comment Use this box to specify any additional information about temporal scope of the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comment
2.5 Geographical Coverage See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Geographical-Coverage Controlled Term This refers to the geographical area pertaining to the datasets. Choose one or more of the following geographies that apply to the dataset/resource: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Controlled-Term
2.5.1 Other Term See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other-Term Term See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term
Term Uri See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term-Uri
2.6 Languages See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Languages Controlled Term This refers to the natural language used for textual metadata (i.e., titles, descriptions, etc.) of a cataloged resource (i.e., dataset or service) or the textual values of a dataset distribution. Choose one or more of the following languages (from ISO 639-2) of the dataset/resource: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Controlled-Term /proxy/skosmos/clavas/ISO639-3
2.6.1 Other Term See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other-Term Term See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term
Term Uri See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term-Uri
2.7 Responsible Agents Specify the individuals or organizations that created, contributed to, and are sharing the dataset. This information is essential in identifying the dataset's provenance. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Responsible-Agents
2.7.1 Contact Point Provide contact information for the project. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Contact-Point Person Name Provide the full name. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Person-Name
Orcid Id See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Orcid-Id
Role See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Role
Email See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Email
2.7.2 Creators Provide the following information for each creator of the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Creators Person Name See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Person-Name
Orcid Id See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Orcid-Id
Organisation Name See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Organisation-Name
Ror Id Provide the Research Organisation Registry (ROR) ID for the affiliated organisation. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Ror-Id
Role Specify the role in the project. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Role
Email Provide the insitutional email of contributor. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Email
2.7.2.1 Comments See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comments Comment See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comment
2.7.3 Contributors See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Contributors Person Name See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Person-Name
Organisation Name See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Organisation-Name
Description Contribution See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description-Contribution
2.7.4 Funders Provide information on each funding organisation. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Funders Funder Name Name of organisation. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Funder-Name
Orcid Id See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Orcid-Id
Ror Id See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Ror-Id
Description Provide a short summary of organisation and grant that may have funded the creation, collection, or curation of the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description
Link See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Link
2.7.5 Publishing Organisation Provide information for each publishing organisation. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Publishing-Organisation Organisation Name Provide the name of the publishing organisation. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Organisation-Name
Ror Id Provide the Research Organisation Registry (ROR) ID for the publishing organisation. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Ror-Id
2.7.5.1 Organisation Type See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Organisation-Type
Controlled Term Choose the type of publishing organisation. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Controlled-Term
2.7.5.1.1 Other Term See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other-Term Term If type of publishing organisation chosen as "Other", please specify here. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term
Term Uri See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term-Uri
2.8 Distribution See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Distribution Dataset Link For instance its DOI, Handle, or ARK. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Dataset-Link
Repository If the dataset has its own dedicated website(s) or is hosted on sites such as github, zenodo, dataverse, marketplace, provide the url(s) here: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Repository
2.8.1 Download See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Download Link Provide link where dataset can be downloaded. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Link
Filetype See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Filetype
Filesize Provide file size in MB. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Filesize
2.8.2 Citation See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Citation Citation Information Provide dataset citation reference. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Citation-Information
2.9 Rights Statement Specify the license(s) and access levels under which the dataset is shared. This information is crucial in determining the appropriate re-use of datasets and access information. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Rights-Statement
2.9.1 License For every relevant license, provide the following information: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#License License Label Provide the identifier of the license(s) used. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#License-Label
Uri See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Uri
2.9.2 Access Details This section details access rights for the dataset, indicating if it is open to all users or restricted to authorized individuals. It also specifies whether access is available anonymously or requires registration. If access is restricted, please fill in this section. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Access-Details
Access Level Choose one of the following access levels. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Access-Level
Description Provide a description of the access restriction. Include an explanation of why access controls are in place. Also highlight any restrictions or limitations such as geographic restrictions, time-limited access, or requirements of fees, national regulation, etc. Also provide any prerequisites for acceptable use, such as reading data usage policy. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description
Url Provide the link to insructions and/or page to request access. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Url
Contact Email Provide email for users to reach out with any questions or concerns regarding data access. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Contact-Email
Access Prerequisites See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Access-Prerequisites
2.10 Version Maintenance See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Version-Maintenance
2.10.1 Version Provide details about this version of the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Version Current Version See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Current-Version
Last Updated See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Last-Updated
Release Date Provide the publication date of this version of the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Release-Date
2.10.2 Maintenance See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Maintenance
Maintenance Status Select one of the following: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Maintenance-Status
2.10.3 Maintenance Plan Summarize the maintenance plan for the dataset: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Maintenance-Plan Updates Provide information about criteria for updating the dataset. Include information on how errors are triaged or handled, and criteria for updating the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Updates
2.10.3.1 Comments See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comments Comment Provide email/contact information for users to communicate errors in data and technical issues: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comment
2.10.4 Next Update Provide details about the next planned update if known: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Next-Update Version Affected See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Version-Affected
Next Update See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Next-Update
Next Version See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Next-Version
2.11 Comments See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comments Comment Please use this space to provide any feedback on this section and to share any other insights or information you think would be useful for this level. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comment
Level 3: Data For each data resource/file in the dataset, fill in the following: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data
3.1 Data Resource Description See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Resource-Description Name Of Resource See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Name-Of-Resource
Description Provide a description of the particular resource/file: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description
Path Provide resource url. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Path
Format Provide file extension for resource (such as csv, json, xls): See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Format
Size Provide file size: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Size
Date Provide date of creation: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Date
Language provide language used in the dataset: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Language
Encoding Specify character encoding of the resource's data file: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Encoding /proxy/skosmos/sd/encodings
3.1.1 Data Subjects See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Subjects
Subjects Choose one or more of the following subjects of the dataset resource: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Subjects
Other If "Other" was chosen, please speciify: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other
3.1.2 Data Modality See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Modality
Modality Choose one or more of the following modalities. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Modality
3.1.2.1 Other Term See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other-Term Term If "Other" or "Multimodal" was chosen, please specify: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term
Term Uri See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Term-Uri
3.1.3 Descriptive Statistics See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Descriptive-Statistics Statistics See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Statistics
3.2 Data Fields Describe every data field in the resource. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Fields
3.2.1 External Schema See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#External-Schema External Schema Link See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#External-Schema-Link
External Schema Note See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#External-Schema-Note
3.2.2 Data Field Describe every data field in the resource: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Field Data Field Name Provide label or identifier for the data field. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Field-Name
Data Field Type Specify the type of data in the filed. For instance, common data types are: string, integer, boolean, date, etc. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Field-Type /proxy/skosmos/sd/xsd-datatypes
Description Field Provide a description of what the field represents, including any specific details about the data format or structure. If the field involves complex data like span indices, explain whether these indices are based on characters or words, and whether they are contiguous (continuous without breaks) or not. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description-Field
Sensitivity Indicate whether the data stored in this field is sensitive. Sensitive data might include personal information that could be harmful if exposed, such as social security numbers, personal addresses, or health information. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Sensitivity
Notable Features List any important or unique attributes of the field that might be relevant for users or systems interacting with the data. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Notable-Features
3.2.2.1 Used Vocabularies Provide information on linked open data schemes, controlled vocabularies, ontologies and taxonomies used during the establishment of the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Used-Vocabularies Vocabulary Summarise linked open data scheme, controlled vocabulary, ontology or taxonomy used during the establishment of the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Vocabulary
Vocabulary Link Provide link to the taxonomy or relevant documentation that describes it. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Vocabulary-Link
3.3 Data Examples See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Examples
3.3.1 Typical Example See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Typical-Example Description Provide a description of a typical example of a data point. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description
Link Provide a link to this data point if possible. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Link
3.3.2 Atypical Example See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Atypical-Example Atypdescription Provide a description of an atypical example of a data point. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Atypdescription
Atyplink Provide a link to this data point if possible. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Atyplink
3.4 Errors Are there any errors, sources of noise, or redundancies in this resource? See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Errors Errordescription Provide a description of the errors, noise, and/or redundancies in this resource. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Errordescription
3.5 External Resources See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#External-Resources
Resources Is the dataset self-contained, or does it link to or otherwise rely on external resources (e.g., websites, other datasets)? See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Resources
Ext Resources Description See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Ext-Resources-Description
Ext Resources If not, please specify what external resources (such as website, other datasets) it relies on and provide links to these resources. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Ext-Resources
3.6 Annotations Fill in this section to specify if any human or algorithmic annotation tasks were performed in the creation of your dataset resource. Repeat this section for every "annotation workforce type". See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Annotations
3.6.1 Annotation Characteristics Describe relevant characteristics of each annotation type as indicated. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Annotation-Characteristics
Annotation Workforce Type See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Annotation-Workforce-Type
Others See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Others
Description See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description
Total Annotations See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Total-Annotations
Total Tokens See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Total-Tokens
Avg Tokens Annotations See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Avg-Tokens-Annotations
Metric See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Metric
3.7 Social Impact See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Social-Impact
3.7.1 Safety See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Safety
Disclaimer See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Disclaimer
Specify See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Specify
3.7.2 Confidentiality See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Confidentiality
Confidentiality Bin See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Confidentiality-Bin
Specify If yes, specify what measures were taken to avoid disclosure of personal information. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Specify
3.7.3 Biases See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Biases Known Biases Identify any known biases present in this dataset, such as stereotyping, underrepresentation, overrepresentation, or misrepresentation of certain social groups. Briefly describe the nature and, if possible, the extent of these biases to help users make informed decisions and mitigate potential harms. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Known-Biases
Steps To Reduce Bias Describe the steps taken to reduce or mitigate biases in the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Steps-To-Reduce-Bias
3.7.3.1 Sens Attributes See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Sens-Attributes
Sensitive Attribute Specify if the dataset contain data that might be considered sensitive in any way (e.g., data that reveals race, sexual orientation, age, ethnicity, disability status, political orientation, religious beliefs, union memberships; location; financial or health data; biometric or genetic data; criminal history).Select all attributes that are represented (directly or indirectly) in the dataset resource: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Sensitive-Attribute
Specify Specify the kind of sensitive attribute in the resource or elaborate further. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Specify
Unintentional Attribute Specify whether there are any human attributes were not explicitly collected as a part of the dataset creation process but can be inferred using additional methods. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Unintentional-Attribute
3.7.4 Ethical Review See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Ethical-Review
Review Was an ethical review conducted in order to create this dataset? See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Review
Description See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description
Outcomes Describe the outcomes of the ethical review, and how they influenced the dataset creation. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Outcomes
Link See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Link
3.7.4.1 Review Contact See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Review-Contact Name Provide name of person who may be contacted in relation to questions on ethical review. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Name
Affiliation See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Affiliation
Contact Provide their email address. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Contact
3.8 Data Provenance For every source used to create this resource, provide the following information: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Provenance Name See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Name
Path Provide a URL of the source if available: See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Path
Description Provide a brief description of the source and why it was used? See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description
Creator Name Provide name of individual creators of the source (if known). See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Creator-Name
Creator Organisation Provide name of affiliated organisations or creating organisation. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Creator-Organisation
Year Publication See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Year-Publication
Language Provide the languages of the source. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Language
Temporal Scope Provide the temporal scope of the resource (if known). See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Temporal-Scope
Geographical Scope Provide the geographical scope of the resource (if known). See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Geographical-Scope
Notable Features Provide any notable features and known biases and issues with the source. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Notable-Features
Datasheet Envelope Provide a link to a datasheet/data-envelope on the source if available. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Datasheet-Envelope
Data Selection See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Selection
3.9 Digitisation See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Digitisation Digitalisation Pipeline If applicable, describe in what way digitisation presents another layer of selection of the whole of a collection available in a cultural heritage institution; state if this is not the case. If applicable, provide selection criteria and metrics that demonstrate how this additional layer of selection has influenced the transformation of the original collection or dataset into the current dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Digitalisation-Pipeline
3.10 Comments See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comments Comment Please use this space to provide any feedback on this section and to share any other insights or information you think would be useful for this level. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comment
Level 4: Uses See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Uses
Purposes See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Purposes
Other If "Other" was chosen above, please speciify. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other
Domains Provide list of key domains of application that dataset has been designed for. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Domains /proxy/skosmos/sd/tadirah
Motivation What motivated the creation of this dataset? What were some of the reasons underlying the major choices involved in putting it together? Provide a description of the specific problem space that this dataset intends to to address. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Motivation
4.1 Use See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Use
Dataset Use See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Dataset-Use
Dataset Use Specify See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Dataset-Use-Specify
4.1.1 Links To Related Items See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Links-To-Related-Items Publications If the dataset was introduced by a paper or there was a paper written describing the dataset, add URL here. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Publications
Related Datasets See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Related-Datasets
Model Trained By Dataset See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Model-Trained-By-Dataset
4.1.2 Suitable Use Case Summarize known suitable and intended use cases of this dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Suitable-Use-Case Suitable Use Case Summarize here. Include links where necessary. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Suitable-Use-Case
Additional Notes See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Additional-Notes
4.1.3 Unsuitable Use Case Summarize known unsuitable and unintended use cases of this dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Unsuitable-Use-Case Unsuitable Use Case See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Unsuitable-Use-Case
Additional Notes See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Additional-Notes
4.2 Use With Other Data See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Use-With-Other-Data
Safety Level See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Safety-Level
Safety Level Other If "Other" was chosen above, please speciify. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Safety-Level-Other
Known Safe Datasets Data Types List the known datasets (provide link) or data types and corresponding transformations that are safe to join or aggregate this dataset with. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Known-Safe-Datasets-Data-Types
Known Unsafe Datasets Data Types List the known datasets or data types and corresponding transformations that are unsafe to join or aggregate this dataset with. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Known-Unsafe-Datasets-Data-Types
4.3 Use In ML Or AI Systems See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Use-In-ML-Or-AI-Systems
Dataset Uses See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Dataset-Uses
Other Dataset Uses If dataset use chosen as "Other", please specify here. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other-Dataset-Uses
Notable Features Describe any notable feature distributions or relationships between individual instances made explicit. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Notable-Features
Known Correlations Summarize any known correlations with the indicated features in this dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Known-Correlations
Usage Guidelines Summarize or link to usage guidelines or policies that consumers should be aware of in using this dataset for ML purposes. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Usage-Guidelines
Data Splits Are there recommended data splits (e.g., training, development/validation, testing)? If so, please provide a description of these splits, explaining the rationale behind them. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Data-Splits
4.4 Sampling See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Sampling
Safety Level See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Safety-Level
Other Safety Level If Safety Level chosen as "Other", please specify here. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other-Safety-Level
Acceptable Sampling Methods Select all applicable acceptable methods to sample this dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Acceptable-Sampling-Methods
Other Acceptable Sampling Methods If Acceptable Sampling Method(s) chosen as "Other", please specify here. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Other-Acceptable-Sampling-Methods
Best Practices See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Best-Practices
Risks And Mitigations Summarize known or residual risks associated with sampling methods when applied to the dataset. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Risks-And-Mitigations
4.5 Comments See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comments Comment Please use this space to provide any feedback on this section and to share any other insights or information you think would be useful for this level. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comment
Level 5: Human Perspective See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Human-Perspective
5.1 Human Annotators Fill this section if human annotators were used to create dataset/resource. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Human-Annotators Annotator Description Provide a brief description for each annotator group performing the human annotation task. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Annotator-Description
5.1.1 Annotation Type See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Annotation-Type Task Type Summarize here. Include links if available. Ideally connect to some existing taxonomy: survey, video annotation, text annotation, image annotation, etc. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Task-Type
Number Of Unique Annotators See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Number-Of-Unique-Annotators
Avgannotations See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Avgannotations
Expertise Of Annotators For example, archival and historical knowledge and reading and understanding historical Dutch. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Expertise-Of-Annotators
Description Of Annotators See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Description-Of-Annotators
Compensation Indicate here whether they were crowdsourced or not, and if not, what compensation they received. For example, 'compensated as per the Dutch CAO'. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Compensation
Language Distribution Of Annotators See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Language-Distribution-Of-Annotators
Num Language Distrib See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Num-Language-Distrib
Age Distribution Of Annotators See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Age-Distribution-Of-Annotators
Num Age Distrib See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Num-Age-Distrib
Geographic Distribution Of Annotators For example, 100% reside in the Netherlands. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Geographic-Distribution-Of-Annotators
Gender Distribution Of Annotators For example, 60% identify as women, 40% as men. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Gender-Distribution-Of-Annotators
Socio Economic Distrib Of Annotators For example, 40% identify as lower middle class, 60% as middle class. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Socio-Economic-Distrib-Of-Annotators
Summary Of Annotation Instructions Summarize here. Include links if available, say to to the annotation instructions, readme. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Summary-Of-Annotation-Instructions
Annotation Platforms Include link(s) if available. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Annotation-Platforms
Additional Notes For example: During the annotation process all annotators were trained to read and understand the original texts by the archival expert and were invited to compare the HTR texts with the scans of the original. This way of working proved instrumental in overcoming limitations of HTR quality. Or any other comments. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Additional-Notes
5.2 Creators See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Creators Creator Positionality Think of aspects that could have impact on the work in terms of positionality, e.g. particular domain of expertise, gender, age, etc. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Creator-Positionality
5.3 Comments See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comments Comment Please use this space to provide any feedback on this section and to share any other insights or information you think would be useful for this level. See documentation at: https://edu.nl/atqm8#Comment
